faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our kimono rental service
faq.q1: How long is the rental period?
faq.a1: We offer half-day (4 hours) and full-day (8 hours) packages. Extra hours are available at 100,000 JPY/hour.
faq.q2: How far in advance should I book?
faq.a2: We recommend booking 1-2 days in advance, especially on weekends and holidays. Walk-ins are also welcome if kimonos are available.
faq.q3: Is hair styling included in the price?
faq.a3: Basic hair styling is included in Lace Kimono packages and above. For basic packages, hair styling is available as an add-on for 100,000 - 200,000 JPY.
faq.q4: Can I wear the kimono outside?
faq.a4: Yes! You can wear the kimono to stroll the streets and take photos at tourist spots. We'll guide you on how to move comfortably.
faq.a5: Yes, we offer a professional photo package with 20 edited photos for 500,000 JPY. Please book in advance.
faq.a6: Free cancellation 24 hours before. Cancellation within 24 hours incurs a 50% fee.
faq.a7: Yes, we have special sizes for various body types. Please let us know in advance so we can prepare.
faq.a8: Kyo Kimono Rental is located in Gion, Kyoto - the heart of Japan's traditional culture, near famous landmarks like Kiyomizu-dera Temple and Yasaka Shrine. Address: 347-25 Gionmachi Kitagawa, Higashiyama Ward, 3F, Kyoto 605-0073, Japan

about.title: Kimono Rental in Kyoto, Japan – Authentic Experience in Gion
about.p1: Kyo Kimono Rental is a premier kimono rental in Kyoto, Japan, located in the heart of Gion. We specialize in authentic Japanese kimono experiences, offering over 200 high-quality styles ranging from traditional elegance to modern fashion.
about.p2: Our kimono rental service provides a wide selection for everyone, including kimono for men, women, boys, and girls, making it perfect for couples, families, and groups. Whether you are looking for a luxurious outfit or an affordable kimono rental in Kyoto, we ensure both quality and value.
about.p3: At Kyo Kimono Rental, our professional team will assist you with proper kimono dressing, elegant hairstyling, and optional professional photography services. As a trusted kimono rental shop in Kyoto, we help you capture unforgettable moments while exploring famous attractions such as Kiyomizu-dera and the historic streets of Gion.
about.p4: Whether you're sightseeing, taking photos, or attending a special event, our service guarantees a seamless and memorable experience.
about.ctaText: Book your kimono rental in Kyoto today and create unforgettable memories with Kyo Kimono Rental.
about.imageAlt: Kyo Kimono Rental shop interior in Kyoto
about.locationValue: 347-25 Gionmachi Kitagawa, Higashiyama Ward, 3F, Kyoto 605-0073, Japan - Near Kiyomizu-dera Temple, Yasaka Shrine, and Gion walking street.

process.title: How Kimono Rental Works at Kyo Kimono Rental
process.subtitle: Just 4 simple steps for an amazing kimono experience
process.step1Desc: Book via website, Zalo, or phone. Choose a plan and date that works for you.
process.step2Desc: Visit our store and pick your favorite kimono from our collection of 200+ styles.
process.step3Desc: Our professional team helps you dress properly and style your hair in just 30 minutes.
process.step4Desc: Stroll through Kyoto, take photos at popular spots, and create unforgettable memories.
